channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Europe's jet fuel supply expected to improve in June
item.description: Jet fuel shortages are a concern for Europe, Asia, and Africa, according to one economic analysis.

item.title: Teachers union criticizes Melania Trump's AI initiative
item.description: A teachers' union leader stated the first lady’s artificial intelligence rollout highlighted concerns about education policy.

item.title: Report: Cost of living up 106% since 2001, diverging from government data
item.description: An index by the Ludwig Institute indicates a significant rise in basic stability costs, exceeding official inflation figures.

item.title: Qualcomm CEO Predicts Shift in Device Relationships
item.description: Fortune provides business news and commentary.
